'''Pookie Baobab''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was the wife of renowned author, poet, and philologist [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]]. Together on [[Manda/Legends|Manda]], Pookie and Ebenn raised four children, who went on to have eighteen grandchildren. Pookie's pride and joy was their pet [[Dwarf bantha/Legends|miniature]] [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]] named [[Nuke]].
